question: How do I reset my password?
answer: To reset your Nimbus password, go to the login page and click 'Forgot password'. Enter your account email and we'll send a reset link valid for 30 minutes. If you don't receive it, check your spam folder or contact support.

question: What are your pricing plans?
answer: Nimbus offers three plans: Free (up to 3 projects, 2 members), Pro at $12/user/month (unlimited projects, advanced reporting), and Business at $25/user/month (SSO, audit logs, priority support). Annual billing saves 20%.

question: How do I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
answer: Go to Settings > Billing > Change Plan. Upgrades take effect immediately and are prorated. Downgrades take effect at the end of your current billing cycle. Your data is never deleted when downgrading.

question: What is your refund policy?
answer: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all paid plans. To request a refund, contact support within 30 days of your purchase. Refunds are processed to the original payment method within 5-7 business days.

question: How do I invite team members?
answer: Go to Settings > Members > Invite. Enter their email addresses and assign a role (Admin, Member, or Viewer). They'll receive an invitation email. Free plans are limited to 2 members; paid plans have no member limit.

question: Do you offer single sign-on (SSO)?
answer: Yes, SSO is available on the Business plan. We support SAML 2.0 and integrate with Okta, Azure AD, and Google Workspace. Configure it under Settings > Security > SSO. Contact support for setup assistance.

question: How is my data backed up?
answer: Nimbus backs up all data daily with point-in-time recovery for the last 30 days. Backups are encrypted at rest. Business plan customers can request data exports at any time from Settings > Data.

question: Can I export my projects?
answer: Yes. Go to Settings > Data > Export. You can export projects as CSV, JSON, or PDF. Exports include tasks, comments, and attachments. Large exports are emailed to you as a download link when ready.

question: How do I cancel my subscription?
answer: Go to Settings > Billing > Cancel Subscription. Your plan stays active until the end of the current billing period, after which your account reverts to the Free plan. Your data is retained but feature access is reduced.

question: Is there a mobile app?
answer: Yes, Nimbus has mobile apps for iOS and Android, available on the App Store and Google Play. The mobile app supports task management, notifications, and comments. Some admin features are web-only.

question: How do I integrate Nimbus with other tools?
answer: Nimbus integrates with Slack, GitHub, Google Drive, and Zapier. Set up integrations under Settings > Integrations. We also offer a REST API for custom integrations, documented at our developer portal (Pro and Business plans).

question: What happens if I exceed my plan limits?
answer: On the Free plan, you cannot create a 4th project until you upgrade or archive an existing one. We never delete data for exceeding limits. You'll see a prompt to upgrade when you hit a limit.

question: How do I contact support?
answer: Free and Pro users can reach support via email at support@nimbus.example with a typical response time of 24-48 hours. Business plan customers get priority support with a 4-hour response target and access to live chat.

question: Do you offer discounts for nonprofits or students?
answer: Yes. Registered nonprofits get 50% off any paid plan, and verified students get the Pro plan free for 12 months. Apply by contacting support with proof of eligibility.

question: How secure is Nimbus?
answer: Nimbus uses TLS encryption in transit and AES-256 at rest. We are SOC 2 Type II compliant. Business plans include audit logs and advanced access controls. We never sell customer data.
